inputs.titre: Début de la construction des thermes de Dioclétien à Rome

reason: The image depicts the construction of a large Roman building, plausibly the Baths of Diocletian. The architecture, including stone walls, columns, and scaffolding, is consistent with Roman construction techniques. The clothing of the workers, simple togas and tunics, aligns with the period. The presence of marble statues also fits the context of Roman architecture. There are no immediately obvious anachronisms. The lack of photographic sharpness is suggestive of AI generation.
